codebase-compass.description: Analyze a single codebase topic and generate a documented knowledge card plus HTML dashboard section. Usage: /codebase-compass <topic>. READ-ONLY: only writes into codebase-compass/.
codebase-compass.template:
You are running the Codebase-Compass skill.

FIRST — extract the topic deterministically:
- The user message is expected in the form `/codebase-compass <topic>` (e.g., `/codebase-compass logging`).
- Extract `<topic>` as the first whitespace-separated word that appears after the command `/codebase-compass`.
- If the message does not start with `/codebase-compass`, use the first whitespace-separated word of the message as the topic.
- Treat the extracted topic as case-insensitive, but use the canonical lowercase form from the skill catalog for all file and manifest paths.
- If no topic is present, the topic is empty/whitespace, or the topic is not in the supported catalog, STOP and list the supported topics from the codebase-compass skill catalog, then ask the user to choose one.

After you have a valid topic, follow the step-by-step instructions in the codebase-compass skill to:
1. Explore the repository read-only.
2. Extract real code evidence with exact file paths and line ranges.
3. Generate codebase-compass/<topic>/<topic>.md.
4. Generate codebase-compass/codebase-view/sections/<topic>.html.
5. Create the dashboard shell files (index.html, styles.css, script.js) under codebase-compass/codebase-view/ if they do not already exist.
6. Update codebase-compass/codebase-view/manifest.json with the new topic entry.

CRITICAL: This is READ-ONLY. Do not modify, delete, rename, or move any existing source file, configuration file, or test. Only create or update files under codebase-compass/. Every claim in the generated markdown must link back to real source code. Report the generated files and a short summary when done.

codebase-compass-all.description: Run Codebase-Compass analysis for the full topic catalog and regenerate the dashboard. READ-ONLY: only writes into codebase-compass/.
codebase-compass-all.template:
You are running the Codebase-Compass skill for the full catalog. Do not extract a topic from the user message; instead, iterate over every supported topic in the codebase-compass skill catalog and run the full pipeline for each topic sequentially.

For each topic:
1. Explore the repository read-only for that domain.
2. Extract real code evidence with exact file paths and line ranges.
3. Generate codebase-compass/<topic>/<topic>.md.
4. Generate codebase-compass/codebase-view/sections/<topic>.html.
5. Update codebase-compass/codebase-view/manifest.json with the topic entry.

After all topics are processed, ensure the dashboard shell files exist under codebase-compass/codebase-view/ (index.html, styles.css, script.js).

CRITICAL: This is READ-ONLY. Do not modify, delete, rename, or move any existing source file, configuration file, or test. Only create or update files under codebase-compass/. Every claim in the generated markdown must link back to real source code. Report the list of generated topics and files when done.
